description: Phase 23 client issue log decision application rules (Items 14-19, client-authorized 2026-06-11).

item14_surrender_validation.decision: Approved chains are the only valid true-surrender patterns; loan-code-only items are excluded as loan accounting.

item15_orphan_payments.decision: All deferred orphan payments convert standalone.
item15_orphan_payments.rationale: Payouts already completed historically in LifePRO; OPEN status would create false pending work in QLAdmin.

item16_unbalanced_claims.decision: Dividend-on-deposit excluded from DB balancing on all claims; two claims approved for UAT; one converts header-only.

header_only_claims.note: No accounting available in LifePRO; convert header only per client decision.

item18_combined_claim_amounts.decision: Death settlement claim amount = DB + loan payout + loan interest combined.

item19_payee_overrides.reason: Client confirmed payout was made to Kenneth Wayne Matthew; extract showed insured name.

general.data_basis: Current extract approved by client; no May 31 re-validation required for sign-off.
general.rebalance_note: Global 2023/603703R exclusion requires balancing engine re-run; deferred unbalanced claims marked REBALANCE_PENDING until executed.
